Notes: Most common cloning vector. lacZ-alpha for blue-white screening. High copy. NCBI L09137 is the complete verified sequence.
Classic cloning vector. Parent of many modern vectors. Lower copy than pUC. NCBI J01749 complete sequence.
Compatible with ColE1 vectors. Useful for dual-plasmid systems. NCBI X06403.
p15A origin compatible with pUC. Kanamycin or ampicillin selection. NCBI X06402.
T7 promoter-based expression. N-terminal His6-tag and T7-tag. Requires T7 RNA polymerase. Addgene #26096.
T7 promoter. C-terminal His6-tag. Ampicillin selection. Addgene #69740.
GST-fusion expression under tac promoter. Thrombin cleavage site. Addgene #27458.
MBP-fusion expression. TEV protease cleavage site. Addgene #26093.
CMV promoter + BGH polyA. Most widely used mammalian expression vector. Addgene #13031.
Same as pcDNA3.1+ but reverse MCS orientation. Addgene #13032.
CAG (CMV enhancer + chicken beta-actin) promoter. Strong ubiquitous expression. Addgene #41583.
ITR-flanked MCS for rAAV production. Serotype-independent. Requires AAV helper functions. Addgene #26403.
3rd-gen lentiviral transfer vector. CMV-GFP-WPRE-PPT. Self-inactivating. Addgene #17448.
Murine Stem Cell Virus retroviral vector. Used for stable transduction of hematopoietic cells. Addgene #24828.
Phagemid with T3/T7 promoters flanking MCS. Blue-white screening. f1 ori for ssDNA rescue. NCBI X52330.
TA-cloning vector from Promega. T-overhangs accept PCR products directly. lacZ blue-white screening.
Destination vector for Gateway LR recombination. AttB sites flank insert. Addgene #17396.
Entry vector for Gateway BP recombination. AttP sites flank MCS. Addgene #12536.
